title: APM: Octo Demo Trace Investigation Tiles
description: A link-and-tiles investigation view for Octo APM traces. It groups logs, spans, attack evidence, API Gateway edge signals, Java errors, DB spans, and payment redirect indicators by Trace ID so analysts can move from APM Trace Explorer into Log Analytics without losing context.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Trace ID' != null and ('Service Name' = 'octo-apm-demo' or 'APM Domain' = 'octo-apm-demo' or 'Attack ID' != null or 'Java APM Path' != null or 'API Gateway Threat Signal' != null or 'Payment Redirect URL' != null) | link span = 5minute 'Trace ID', 'Service Name', 'Span ID', 'Attack Stage' | eventstats distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, sum(Count) as Events, distinctcount('Service Name') as Services, distinctcount('Span ID') as Spans, distinctcount('Attack Stage') as Stages

visualizationOptions.tileLayoutXml: <title-text>Traces</title-text><title-text>Events</title-text><title-text>Spans</title-text><title-text>Services</title-text><title-text>Attack Stages</title-text><title-text>Services</title-text><title-ai name="Ask AI" allow-conversation="true" allow-model-selection="true"><prompt><param field="Traces" alias="Trace_Count"/><param field="Events" alias="Event_Count"/><param field="Spans" alias="Span_Count"/><param field="Services" alias="Service_Count"/><param field="Stages" alias="Attack_Stage_Count"/><![CDATA[Analyze this Octo APM trace investigation tile. Provide three short lines: what changed, which Trace ID or span family to pivot into first, and whether attack, payment, API Gateway, Java, or DB evidence is present. Use only the supplied fields.]]></prompt></title-ai><title-text>Attack Stages</title-text><title-text>Spans</title-text>

ask_ai_prompts: Summarize the Octo APM trace investigation tiles and identify the first Trace ID to pivot into.
Which span, service, attack stage, or payment redirect signal explains the current trace cluster?
